name: GORYO

abilities.name: Ephemeral
abilities.text: Ephemeral (4): After this model is summoned, it is dealt 4 damage which may not be reduced.

abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.text: Incorporeal: Reduce damage dealt to this model by 1. Damage from (melee) actions may not be reduced this way.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: Flight: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

triggers.name: Spirit Rend
triggers.text: The target must have an Adversary token. When resolving, this action deals +1 damage to the target. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: "You..."
actions.effects: The target gains an Adversary token.

triggers.name: On Your Heels
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Hateful Spirits
triggers.text: Summon a Seishin in base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: The characteristics line shows 'Minion (2) ◆ Urami'. The '(2)' indicates model_limit of 2.
STN: 11 appears above the characteristics line - this represents health value of 11.
